global_summary.note: WEEKLY UPDATE: Past-7-day source sweep found no newer hard token disclosure than OpenAI's Apr 13 enterprise update, but did find fresh Anthropic launch / performance-strain news and new ByteDance AI-cost coverage consistent with continued demand. GATT therefore keeps OpenAI anchored to the Apr 13 official post and rolls Google, Anthropic, and Doubao forward one more week. Global total: 250T→254T/day.

token_gdp.note: Blended price per vendor region. US ~$1.50/M tokens, EU ~$1.20/M, CN ~$0.10/M.
token_gdp.key_insight: China still generates 58% of global tokens but only 9% of Token GDP. US generates 37% of tokens but 82% of Token GDP. OpenAI and Anthropic continue to add higher-priced enterprise/agentic volume; Doubao remains the volume king at 125T/day.

key_stats.344x_headline: A US user generates 421× more AI tokens per day than an Indian user
key_stats.great_divergence: China: 58% of tokens, 9% of Token GDP. US: 37% of tokens, 82% of Token GDP.
key_stats.doubao_note: Doubao accounts for roughly 49% of global token volume as of Apr 20, 2026 (125T / 254T).
key_stats.openai_api_milestone: OpenAI continued to report >15B API tokens/minute in its Apr 13, 2026 enterprise update; GATT carries that official floor into the Apr 20 weekly cut.

vendors.name: Doubao (ByteDance)
vendors.source: NO NEW HARD TOKEN DISCLOSURE IN THE PAST 7 DAYS. Fresh Apr 20 coverage says AI spending is pressuring ByteDance profitability, consistent with sustained model demand. GATT keeps the Apr 1 official 120T/day baseline and rolls forward another week.

revision_history.reason: Initial estimate from Volcano Engine Q3 2025 disclosure
OFFICIAL DISCLOSURE: Volcengine announced 120T/day at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026). Source: Xinzhiyuan report. Previous estimate 69.2T was extrapolation — actual is +73% higher.
4-day extrapolation at 8%/mo from Apr 1 official baseline of 120T. No new hard data this week. ByteDance continues aggressive agentic tool expansion.

Past-7-day follow-up coverage (TechNode / Tech in Asia, Apr 7) reconfirms 120T/day official baseline and three-month doubling. No newer hard count. 12-day extrapolation at 8%/mo from Apr 1 baseline: 120T→123T.
No new hard token figure in the Apr 13–20 news sweep. Fresh coverage points to continued AI-cost intensity, so GATT rolls the confirmed 120T/day baseline forward one more week at 8%/mo: 123T→125T.

vendors.note: Latest hard usage anchor remains the Apr 1 / Apr 7 120T-day disclosure. No newer token count surfaced in the Apr 13–20 sweep. One more week of 8% monthly roll-forward lifts Doubao 123T→125T/day.

vendors.name: Google Gemini (All Surfaces)
vendors.source: NO NEW HARD DISCLOSURE THIS WEEK. Last confirmed signal remains 10B+ API tokens/min plus ~750M Gemini app users; GATT rolls the estimate forward one more week.
vendors.note: No fresh Google token-throughput disclosure surfaced in the Apr 13–20 sweep. GATT keeps the Apr 1 reconfirmation (10B+ API tokens/min) and rolls Gemini 58T→59T/day.

revision_history.reason: Initial estimate using Q4 2025 API-only metric
ANCHORED: Pichai Q4 2025 earnings (Feb 4) confirmed 10B tokens/min API = 14.4T/day. All Surfaces estimated 55T.

FRESH RECONFIRMATION: Pichai reaffirmed 'over 10 billion tokens per minute via API' (Apr 1 week, Alphabet Q1 context). Gemma 4 launched Apr 1 — 'most capable open models to date' with agentic focus + Gemini API Docs MCP for developers. Google Cloud revenue +48% YoY. 4-day extrapolation at 8%/mo: 55T→57T.
No fresh hard source in past 7 days. Weekly roll-forward at 8%/mo from Apr 6 value: 57T→58T.
No fresh hard source in the Apr 13–20 news sweep. Weekly roll-forward at 8%/mo from Apr 13 value: 58T→59T.

vendors.name: OpenAI (ChatGPT + API)
vendors.source: LATEST HARD SOURCE STILL WITHIN THE PAST-7-DAY WINDOW: OpenAI's Apr 13 enterprise update says APIs process more than 15B tokens/min, Codex reached 3M weekly active users, enterprise is >40% of revenue, and GPT-5.4 is driving record agentic engagement. GATT carries that official floor into this weekly cut and modestly rolls total demand forward.
vendors.note: API hard data remains >15B tokens/min = 21.6T/day API-only. The Apr 13 enterprise post is still the freshest hard disclosure in this weekly window. GATT rolls overlap-adjusted total 41T→42T/day into the Apr 20 cut.

revision_history.reason: Initial estimate from $5B ARR
Validated by 2.5B prompts/day (Feb 27 disclosure)
$24B ARR confirmed. Conservative 32T held pending direct token throughput.

OFFICIAL HARD DATA: openai.com $122B raise announcement (Mar 31) explicitly states 'Our APIs now process more than 15 billion tokens per minute' = 21.6T/day API/Codex/enterprise. Combined with consumer ChatGPT (2.5B prompts/day × ~8K tokens ≈ 20T) and overlap correction, conservative total: 40T. Previous 32T was consumer-side estimate only. Confidence upgraded medium-high → high. Source: https://openai.com/index/accelerating-the-next-phase-ai/

OpenAI enterprise update (Apr 13) reconfirms >15B tokens/min API throughput and raises Codex weekly actives from 2M→3M. Consumer + enterprise demand still accelerating; conservative total revised 40T→41T.

Apr 13 official enterprise update remained the freshest hard source during the Apr 13–20 sweep. Weekly roll-forward at 15%/mo from 41T→42T preserves the >15B tokens/min API floor while carrying forward higher Codex / agentic engagement.

vendors.name: Claude (Anthropic)
vendors.source: NO NEW HARD TOKEN COUNT THIS WEEK. Fresh Apr 16–17 Anthropic product launch and user-backlash coverage still point to severe demand pressure and quota burn, so GATT rolls Claude one more week.
vendors.note: The Apr 13–20 sweep found launch/performance-strain news but no fresh token-throughput disclosure. GATT therefore continues the demand-pressure roll-forward: 16T→17T/day.

revision_history.reason: Initial conservative estimate
ARR resolved: $9B→$14B→$19B→$25B+ timeline. Multiple corroborating sources. Conservative 14.6T held.

DEMAND SIGNALS: Claude Code subscription crisis (DevClass Apr 1) — users hitting limits 'way faster than expected', cache bugs inflating costs 10-20×, Anthropic imposed 5h peak-hour session limits. Anthropic cut off OpenClaw + third-party tools from subscriptions Apr 4 due to compute strain (Boris Cherny: 'our subscriptions weren't built for the usage patterns of these third-party tools'). $25B+ ARR (SemiAnalysis Apr 1). All signals point to demand exceeding capacity. Conservative 4-day extrapolation at 18%/mo: 14.6→15.0T.
No new hard token count. Continued compute-strain signals after Apr 4 policy shift justify weekly roll-forward at 18%/mo: 15T→16T.
No new hard token count in the Apr 13–20 sweep. Continued launch buzz, quota burn complaints, and compute-strain signals justify one more weekly roll-forward at 18%/mo: 16T→17T.

vendors.note: V4 Lite confirmed to run on Huawei chips (The Information, Apr 2026) — signals continued China infrastructure independence. 130M MAU. No official token throughput data. Value nudged to 8.2T.

correction_log.reason: Past-7-day scan: OpenAI enterprise post (Apr 13) reconfirms >15B API tokens/min and lifts Codex to 3M WAU; TechNode/Tech in Asia (Apr 7) reconfirm Doubao >120T/day; Anthropic compute-strain signals persist after Apr 4 subscription changes; no new hard Google disclosure, so Gemini was rolled forward conservatively.

OFFICIAL HARD DATA: openai.com $122B raise announcement (Mar 31, 2026) explicitly states 'Our APIs now process more than 15 billion tokens per minute' = 21.6T/day API/Codex/enterprise. Previous 32T was based on consumer-side 2.5B prompts/day estimate alone. New: API(21.6T) + Consumer(~20T overlap-adjusted) = 40T conservative. Source: https://openai.com/index/accelerating-the-next-phase-ai/

Pichai reconfirmed 'over 10 billion tokens per minute via API' this week (Apr 1 context, Alphabet Q1). Gemma 4 launched Apr 1. Google Cloud +48% YoY. 4-day extrapolation at 8%/mo + fresh reconfirmation data point.

Demand signals: subscription crisis (Apr 1) users hitting limits way faster than expected; Anthropic cut off OpenClaw/third-party tools Apr 4 citing compute strain; $25B+ ARR (SemiAnalysis Apr 1). 4-day extrapolation at 18%/mo + demand signal upgrade.

Cascade from OpenAI official 15B tokens/min disclosure (+8T), Gemini reconfirmation (+2T), Claude demand signals (+0.4T), minor vendor extrapolations. US share rises 34%→35%, China share dips 61%→58% as US volume upgraded with hard data.
US per-capita update: 87T/335M = 259.7K tokens/person. 259.7K/0.66K = 394×. Doubao share: 120T/245T = 49% (down from 51% as OpenAI/Gemini volumes upgraded with hard data).

OFFICIAL DISCLOSURE: Volcengine announced 120T/day at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026). Reported by Xinzhiyuan. Previous estimate was extrapolated from Jan 2026 baseline — actual is +73% higher. Source: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/uc6NWmhNBzmsChN9xJdz_w
Cascade from Doubao official 120T disclosure. China now 61% of global volume. Doubao alone = 51% of global total.
